products.name: ET15
products.descriptor: Fixed-wing e-VTOL UAV, 15 kg payload, 100 km range, fully electric with hybrid option

Shortening distances to save lives

products.name: FTS
products.descriptor: UAV flight termination system compliant with MOC Light-UAS.2511.01, integrates into any aircraft

evidence.snippet:
FTS
===
Enabling technology for urban and semi-urban operations

The Flight Termination System (FTS) is a safety solution designed to enhance the operational security of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs).
This advanced equipment is built for seamless integration into any aircraft, offering unparalleled reliability and adaptability for diverse applications.
Fully compatible with MOC Light-UAS.2511.01, the FTS meets rigorous safety standards, ensuring effective risk mitigation during UAV operations.

products.name: UATracker
products.descriptor: UAV fleet management software for operations planning, maintenance, and crew tracking

evidence.snippet:
UATracker
=========
The Brain Behind the Fleet
Our software is designed to ensure compliance, efficiency, and seamless management of your drone fleet.
With a 360-degree view of your entire fleet, you gain the insights needed to optimize performance, enhance safety, and ensure regulatory compliance.

unresolved_questions: No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance language found anywhere in the corpus for any product.
Readiness is 'unknown' for all four products — no pricing, lead times, or 'in stock' language present on any product page.
The FTS page references EASA compliance (MOC Light-UAS.2511.01) but no US-side compliance claims.
ET15 page lists 'Design for DVR SAIL IV' under Safety, indicating European regulatory framing (EASA SORA); no US-equivalent certification mentioned.
